smartafk.author: TheDroid
smartafk.description: Automatically detects inactivity and updates your Discord status. Syncs with Solari via WebSocket.
smartafk.changelog:
### v1.1.2 (2026-01-28)
- 🐛 **Fixed:** Infinite reconnection loop ("zombie connection") when plugin is disabled
- ⚡ **Optimized:** Connection cleanup logic

### v1.1.1 (2026-01-20)
- 🐛 **Fixed:** Custom status sync with Discord servers when cleared
- 🐛 **Fixed:** Status persistence on other devices fixed
- ⚡ **Improved:** Reliability with new retry mechanism

### v1.1.0 (2024-12-24)
- 🐛 **Fixed:** Status no longer gets stuck on 'Idle' when opening Discord on mobile/browser
- ⚡ **New:** Patches Discord's native idle timeout instead of manually setting status
- ⚡ Discord now handles idle detection natively, syncing correctly across devices

### v1.0.0
- 🚀 Initial release
- ✅ Auto-detect mouse/keyboard inactivity
- ✅ Customizable timeout settings
- ✅ Syncs with Solari app via WebSocket

spotifysync.author: TheDroid
spotifysync.description: Sync Spotify with Discord Rich Presence and Controls.
spotifysync.changelog:
### v2.1.3 (2026-03-19)
- 🔒 **Critical Fix: Token Amnesia**: The plugin now completely ignores Auth sync payloads pushed from the Solari Desktop App to prevent Discord from overwriting its valid tokens with empty ones on PC startup.
- 🛡️ **Critical Fix: Race Condition**: Wrapped the `refresh_token` Spotify Web API OAuth flow inside a JavaScript Promise Mutex. This prevents concurrent background routines (like lyrics fetchers and status pollers) from firing duplicate refresh requests at the exact millisecond the 1-hour token expires. Duplicate requests previously caused Spotify to return an `invalid_grant` error, forcing the plugin to falsely assume access was revoked and wiping your perfectly valid login keys from disk. Your Premium connection is now immortal.

### v2.1.2 (2026-03-18)
- ⚡ **Play/Pause Responsiveness**: Reduced internal debounce from 800ms to 400ms for snappier playback controls.
- 💾 **Connection Persistence**: Added "Safe Merge" logic to prevent Solari App from wiping plugin tokens on restart.
- 🛑 **Rate Limiting**: Added support for Spotify's updated API limits (429 handling with Retry-After).
- ⚠️ **Explicit Premium Warning**: Added prominent UI alerts (styled boxes and text) to clarify that Spotify Premium is required for full functionality.
- 🔍 **Improved Detection**: Enhanced account resolution engine for more reliable Discord local control.

### v2.1.1 (2026-02-25)
- 🛡️ **Critical Fix:** **Premium Fallback** now activates even when Discord reports the player as open but has no real track data (e.g., Spotify not linked to Discord). Previously, the widget would show "Not Playing" instead of fetching the actual playback state via Web API.
- 🎵 **Improvement:** **Lyrics Search** completely rewritten with 4-tier fallback. Strips suffixes like (Remastered), (feat. X), [Deluxe], etc. before searching. Prioritizes synced (LRC) lyrics over plain text.

### v2.1.0 (2026-02-25)
- 🚀 **New:** **Lyrics Viewer** with synced LRC support, auto-scrolling, and premium blur effects.
- 📱 **New:** **Device Picker** (Spotify Connect) to instantly transfer playback between your PC, Phone, TV, or Echo directly from Discord.
- 🛡️ **Critical Fix:** **AFK Premium Fallback**. The plugin now seamlessly switches to the Spotify Web API when Discord stores go idle, ensuring the widget never disappears again.
- ⚡ **Improvement:** **Real-Time Volume Sync**. Added a dedicated high-speed background poll. If you change the volume on your phone, the slider updates instantly.

### v2.0.2 (2026-02-15)
- 🚀 **Critical Fix:** Solved persistent "Token Expirado (401)" errors by scanning for `CONNECTION_ACCESS_TOKEN`.
- 🐛 **Fix:** Library button now opens playlist view correctly.
- ⚡ **Improvement:** Smarter local module detection.
- 🐞 **Fix:** Removed triple-notification on Share.
- 🛠️ **Fix:** Added startup delay for better reliability.

### v2.0.1 (2026-02-15) - The Ghost Fix 👻
- 🚀 **Fix:** Resolved misleading "Local Control failed" error toast when Web API fallback is successful.
- 🐛 **Fix:** Fixed `Next`, `Previous`, and `Pause` controls by correctly passing `accountId` to local modules.
- 🔍 **Improvement:** Enhanced local module search strategy (added `searchExports` and Lottie player filtering).
- 🔗 **Improvement:** Made the "developer.spotify.com" link clickable in the settings panel.
- 🛠️ **Dev:** Added version check log for easier troubleshooting.

### v2.0.0 (The Complete Rebirth)
- 🚀 **Total Architecture Rewrite**: Built from the ground up for stability, speed, and premium features.
- 🔐 **Premium Auth System**: Integrated Spotify PKCE authentication for secure access to advanced player controls.
- 🎮 **Advanced Player Controls**: Added Shuffle, Repeat, Like/Unlike, real-time Volume Slider, and Seek Bar.
- 📏 **New List Views**: Library and Queue views with **Auto-Expanding Height** (450px) for better navigation.
- 🛡️ **Security & Privacy**: Added Editable Client ID field with a visibility toggle (Reveal/Mask).
- ✨ **Premium Glassmorphic Design**: Redesigned with card-based layouts and blur effects that match the Solari aesthetic.
- ⚡ **Performance & Sync**: Reliable WebSocket communication with Solari APP and fixed UI legibility bugs in multiple themes.

### v1.0.1 (2026-01-28)
- 🐛 **Fixed:** Infinite reconnection loop ("zombie connection") when plugin is disabled
- ⚡ **Optimized:** Connection cleanup logic

### v1.0.0
- 🚀 Initial release
- ✅ Play/Pause controls
- ✅ Next/Previous track buttons
- ✅ Now Playing display in Discord
